mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`user` (user_type, name, email, password, resident_number, identification_number,phone, gender, age,is_terms_agreed) VALUES ( IFNULL(#{user.userType} , 'customer'), #{user.name}, #{user.email}, #{user.password}, #{user.residentNumber}, #{user.identificationNumber}, #{user.phone}, #{user.gender}, #{user.age}, #{user.isTermsAgreed})

INSERT INTO `bank`.`member` (name, email, password,level,auth,team,counter_number,status,join_date,last_login,created_at) VALUES (#{member.name}, #{member.email}, #{member.password}, #{member.level}, #{member.auth}, #{member.team}, #{member.counterNumber}, IFNULL(#{member.status}, 0), IFNULL(#{member.joinDate}, NOW()), IFNULL(#{member.lastLogin}, NOW()), IFNULL(#{member.createdAt}, NOW()) )

INSERT INTO `bank`.`user` (user_type, name, email, password, resident_number, phone, gender, age,is_terms_agreed) VALUES ( IFNULL(#{user.userType} , 'unregisterCustomer'), #{user.name}, #{user.email}, #{user.password}, #{user.residentNumber}, #{user.phone}, #{user.gender}, #{user.age}, #{user.isTermsAgreed} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE `bank`.`member`
name = #{member.name},
level = #{member.level},
auth = #{member.auth},
team = #{member.team},
counter_number = #{member.counterNumber},
status = #{member.status},
password = #{member.password},
WHERE email = #{member.email}
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, name, level, auth, team, status, counter_number AS counterNumber, join_date AS joinDate, last_login AS lastLogin, created_at AS createdAt FROM `bank`.`member`

SELECT `id` AS `id`, `email` AS `email` , `password` AS `password`, `resident_number` AS `residentNumber`, `name` AS `name`, `user_type` AS `userType`, `phone` AS `phone`, `grade` AS `grade`, `gender` AS `gender`, `age` AS `age` FROM `bank`.`user` WHERE email = #{email} AND password = #{password} AND resident_number = #{residentNumber} LIMIT 1

SELECT `id` AS `id`, `email` AS `email` , `password` AS `password`, `resident_number` AS `residentNumber`, `identification_number` AS `identificationNumber`, `name` AS `name`, `user_type` AS `userType`, `phone` AS `phone`, `grade` AS `grade`, `gender` AS `gender`, `age` AS `age` FROM `bank`.`user` WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1

SELECT `email` AS `email` , `password` AS `password`, `resident_number` AS `residentNumber`, `name` AS `name`, `user_type` AS `userType`, `phone` AS `phone`, `grade` AS `grade`, `gender` AS `gender`, `age` AS `age` FROM `bank`.`user` WHERE email = #{email} AND password = #{password} LIMIT 1

SELECT `id` AS `id`, `email` AS `email`, `password` AS `password`, `resident_number` AS `residentNumber`, `identification_number` AS `identificationNumber`, `name` AS `name`, `user_type` AS `userType`, `phone` AS `phone`, `grade` AS `grade`, `gender` AS `gender`, `age` AS `age` FROM `bank`.`user` WHERE resident_number = #{residentNumber} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, email, password, name, level, auth, team, status, counter_number AS counterNumber, join_date AS joinDate, last_login AS lastLogin, created_at AS createdAt FROM `bank`.`member` WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1

SELECT `id` AS `id`, `user_type` AS `userType`, `email` AS `email`, `password` AS `password`, `resident_number` AS `residentNumber`, `identification_number` AS `identificationNumber`, `name` AS `name`, `user_type` AS `userType`, `phone` AS `phone`, `grade` AS `grade`, `gender` AS `gender`, `age` AS `age` FROM `bank`.`user` WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT `email` AS `email`, `code` AS `code`, `is_verified` AS `isVerified`, `is_used` AS `isUsed`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `expires_at` AS `expiresAt` FROM `bank`.`email_tokens` WHERE `email` = #{email} AND `code` = #{code} ORDER BY `created_at` DESC LIMIT 1
